authorization: Authorize fresh lower-turnover / higher-density candidate selection plan only.
authorization_pivot_note: Operator selected Option 2 (review/comparison lane T1-style; skip selection-plan format) after this session halted on detecting parallel session's s14-d1 PLAN at 5376de7 and DR10 v2 governance supplement at fdf9d6e. This memo is the pivoted output - review/comparison rather than independent selection plan.

primary_artifact.selection_plan_source: rev2 plan in ee2bfc1; 'T1 rev2 co-recommended at 43/60' alongside T2 rev2 cash-equity basket
primary_artifact.title: Add s14-d1 multi-instrument RSI(2) bi-directional micro-futures basket Tier-N spec PLAN

supplement_artifact.content: Governance-only supplement accepting DR10 v2 structurally; documents Option F selection (OR -> AND); future-framework governance rule; does NOT modify DR10 v2 SEAL; does NOT authorize any candidate
supplement_artifact.title: DR10 v2 governance supplement

predecessor_anchors_this_session.authorization_directive: Author selection plan with K9/DR10 reachability arithmetic; compare 6 candidate families; final recommendation with strength rating. Pivot taken: review parallel s14-d1 PLAN per operator Option 2.

parallel_claim.k9_is_clearance_at_70pct: CLEARS K9 WITH STRONG MARGIN (~12-24x floor)
parallel_claim.per_instrument_signal_density_estimate: 20-40 trades/year (citing s13-d1's MNQ rate 34.34/y as central)

alternative_arithmetic_at_30pct_independ.oos_2y_total: 36 x 2.0 = 72 (FAILS K9; 0.72x of floor - BELOW threshold 100)

this_session_audit.arithmetic_check_at_70pct_independence: PASSES (4 x 30/y x 0.7 = 84/y central; 84/y x 4.6y = 386 IS total; 84/y x 2.0y = 168 OOS total; all match parallel's table)
this_session_audit.independence_assumption_critique: 70% effective independence is OPTIMISTIC for highly-correlated equity-index micro-futures. Parallel's own table 14.1 estimates K10 avg_pairwise_correlation at 0.7-0.9 (US equity-index micros). At 0.7-0.9 pairwise correlation, effective independence is plausibly 30-50%, not 70%.
this_session_audit.k9_reachability_audit_verdict: PASSES at 70% independence assumption; BORDERLINE-TO-FAILS at 50% or 30% independence. Parallel's K9-OOS margin claim of 2-4x depends critically on the 70% independence assumption. The plan does not provide independent evidence for 70%; it appears to be a heuristic.
this_session_audit.recommendation_for_parallel: PLAN-time K9 reachability table should be re-computed at conservative independence band (30-50%) and re-disclosed in SEAL turn if parallel proceeds to DRAFT. OOS K9 margin at 30% independence is sub-threshold; this is the binding scenario that should be pre-disclosed.

parallel_claim.annual_turnover_estimate: 100-300 (turnover branch FIRES; alone does not fire DR10 v2 under AND-conjunction)
parallel_claim.reasoning: extrapolated from s13-d1 baseline 2.35% at $200k single-MNQ; basket at $100k roughly doubles cost_drag
parallel_claim.sensitivity_offered: DA4=C ($200k) alternative at SEAL if borderline becomes binding

da4_c_alternative_check.key_insight: Cost_drag at DA4=C is NUMERICALLY IDENTICAL to DA4=B because the ratio (trades x per_trade_cost) / capital is invariant under proportional capital scaling. Parallel's DA4=C 'mitigation lever' may not actually clear DR10 v2 cost_drag branch.

detailed_arithmetic_check.s13_d1_baseline: 159 trades over 4.6y on $200k cash; S2 cost_drag 2.35%; implied per-trade cost ~$29.56

s14_d1_at_da4_b_central.contracts_per_trade_proportional_to_capi: 0.5x of s13-d1 (half capital at same risk %)
s14_d1_at_da4_b_central.dr10_v2_status_at_central_estimate: FIRES (both branches: turnover >> 0.50 AND cost_drag > 0.05; AND conjunction triggers) -> REJECT_FAST

this_session_audit.dr10_v2_reachability_audit_verdict: Parallel's DR10 v2 cost_drag estimate at DA4=B is approximately correct directionally (BORDERLINE) but likely understated at central case. This audit indicates central-case cost_drag is 5.71% (just above 5%). High-trade-count scenarios are clearly above threshold. **Critical finding: DA4=C ('alternative at SEAL') does NOT meaningfully reduce cost_drag because the ratio is capital-invariant under proportional sizing. The actual mitigation lever for DR10 v2 cost_drag is DA3 (per-trade risk %), not DA4 (capital).** Parallel's PLAN identifies DA4 as primary mitigation; this audit suggests DA3=C is the structurally effective lever.
this_session_audit.parallel_estimate_vs_this_audit: Parallel's 4-5% estimate at DA4=B aligns with the low-to-central band of this audit. This audit shows central estimate at 5.71% and high estimate at 7.60% - both ABOVE 5% threshold. The borderline characterization is correct directionally but parallel's estimate may be optimistic on the central case.

operator_criteria_evaluation.details: K9 IS clears with strong margin under 70% independence; K9 OOS reachability claims 2-4x margin at 70% independence but drops to 1.20x at 50% or sub-threshold at 30%. PLAN does not justify 70% with independent evidence.

operator_criteria_evaluation.criterion: Must reduce DR10 turnover risk versus RSI(2)
operator_criteria_evaluation.details: Annual turnover INCREASES from s13-d1's 84.7851 to parallel-estimated 100-300. Under v1 OR-disjunctive DR10 this would worsen the failure. Under v2 AND-conjunction, the turnover branch alone does not trigger DR10 v2, so the framework permits this trade-off. But the literal operator criterion 'reduce DR10 turnover risk' is NOT met in absolute terms - the turnover ratio worsens. The reduction is achieved indirectly by relying on the AND-conjunction rather than by genuinely lowering turnover.

operator_criteria_evaluation.criterion: Must not simply revive parked Donchian variants
operator_criteria_evaluation.details: F3 RSI mechanic family; not F1 Donchian. Parallel PLAN section 4.4 explicitly distinguishes from s10-d1, s10-d2.
Parallel PLAN explicitly preserves s10-d2, s12-d1, s13-d1, all other parked/terminal verdicts byte-equivalent under v1. DR10 v2 binding scope strictly s14+ forward only.
DIAGNOSTIC_ONLY_NOT_LIVE_GRADE preserved; live block at 6 gates preserved; no FRC.

operator_criteria_evaluation.criterion: Must prefer existing audit-clean data if possible
operator_criteria_evaluation.details: MNQ.c.0 audit-clean CSV is reused byte-equivalent (no new fetch for MNQ). MES.c.0, MYM.c.0, M2K.c.0 require fresh operator-side Databento fetch + DR9 audit. 3 of 4 instruments need new data acquisition - significant data-layer dependency.

operator_criteria_evaluation.criterion: Must require cost-stress from day one
operator_criteria_evaluation.details: 5-tier S0..S4 cost-stress matrix carried byte-equivalent from s13-d1 SEAL; LOCKED at PLAN.

operator_criteria_evaluation.criterion: Must clearly separate strategy validation, methodology/template building, and edge discovery
operator_criteria_evaluation.details: Parallel PLAN does not explicitly state which of these three categories the candidate occupies. Substantively, s14-d1 is primarily a FRAMEWORK_REACHABILITY_TEST under DR10 v2 (testing whether the v2 AND-conjunction permits a candidate that would have failed under v1) with secondary edge-discovery on the multi-instrument scope hypothesis. PLAN should make this framing explicit.

operator_criteria_evaluation.criterion: Must explicitly state whether candidate is meant to optimize edge or test framework reachability
operator_criteria_evaluation.details: Same gap as above. PLAN reads as edge-focused (reusing s13-d1's economically-profitable mechanic) but is structurally a framework-reachability test (multi-instrument scope under v2). This dual purpose should be declared at PLAN.

operator_criteria_evaluation.criterion: Must include opportunity cost for each path
operator_criteria_evaluation.details: Parallel PLAN section 19 enumerates next-phase authorization options (DRAFT / availability-probe / contingency / T2 rev2 alternative / defer). T2 rev2 cash-equity basket is mentioned as alternative but not directly compared on K9/DR10/cost_drag metrics.

operator_criteria_evaluation.criterion: Must include final recommendation with strength rating (STRONG/MODERATE/WEAK)
operator_criteria_evaluation.details: This is a PLAN for one candidate, not a selection plan among alternatives. No recommendation strength rating expected at this layer. This session provides the recommendation strength (see section 7 below).

missed_item_1_independence_assumption_fr.description: PLAN section 9.2 assumes 70% effective signal independence across 4 highly-correlated equity-index micro-futures without independent justification. Parallel's own K10 estimate (table 14.1) predicts avg pairwise correlation 0.7-0.9 - which would imply much lower effective independence (~30-50%).
missed_item_1_independence_assumption_fr.impact: K9-OOS reachability margin shrinks from claimed 2-4x to 1.20x at 50% independence or fails at 30%. PLAN-time confidence in OOS K9 is overstated.
missed_item_1_independence_assumption_fr.recommendation: At SEAL or P3 BUILD, run an independence pilot using s13-d1's MNQ.c.0 signal log; estimate empirical signal-correlation across instruments using historical proxies. Re-disclose K9-OOS margin under conservative independence band.

missed_item_2_cost_drag_central_case_est.description: PLAN section 10.2 estimates S2 cost_drag at DA4=B as 4-5% via doubling s13-d1's 2.35%. This audit's detailed calc (audit section 2) puts central case at 5.71% - just above 5% threshold.
missed_item_2_cost_drag_central_case_est.impact: DR10 v2 fires at central case under DA4=B. Parallel's 'CLEARS conditional' framing may be optimistic.
missed_item_2_cost_drag_central_case_est.recommendation: At SEAL, recompute cost_drag per-instrument with explicit per-trade dollar-cost arithmetic (commission per contract x contracts x 2 legs + slippage tick value x ticks x contracts x 2 legs) summed across instruments. Confirm whether DA3=C (per-trade risk reduction) is needed to bring cost_drag safely below 5%.

missed_item_3_da4_capital_scaling_does_n.description: PLAN section 10.3 offers DA4=C ($200k) as 'alternative at SEAL if BORDERLINE concern'. But cost_drag = (trades x per_trade_cost) / capital is INVARIANT under proportional capital scaling because per_trade_cost scales linearly with contracts which scale linearly with capital at constant risk%.
missed_item_3_da4_capital_scaling_does_n.impact: DA4 capital scaling does NOT meaningfully reduce cost_drag. The structural mitigation lever for DR10 v2 cost_drag is DA3 (per-trade risk %), NOT DA4. PLAN identifies the wrong primary lever.
missed_item_3_da4_capital_scaling_does_n.recommendation: PLAN section 8.1 (DA4 borderline note) and section 10.3 (sensitivity analysis) should be re-derived. DA3=C (0.25% per-trade risk) halves per-trade cost without halving signal density, achieving meaningful cost_drag reduction without K9 impact.

missed_item_4_edge_vs_framework_reachabi.description: PLAN does not explicitly declare whether s14-d1 is primarily an EDGE-DISCOVERY candidate or a FRAMEWORK-REACHABILITY-TEST candidate. Substantively it is both, but the priority shapes how results should be interpreted.
missed_item_4_edge_vs_framework_reachabi.impact: Without explicit framing, observed metrics at P6 IS could be interpreted as either 'edge confirmed' (if positive) or 'framework reachability confirmed' (if K9 + DR10 v2 both clear) - leading to ambiguous downstream advancement.
missed_item_4_edge_vs_framework_reachabi.recommendation: At SEAL, declare candidate's primary purpose explicitly. This audit suggests s14-d1 is primarily a framework-reachability test (does multi-instrument scope under DR10 v2 permit a viable candidate? does K9 clear with multi-instrument signal aggregation?) with secondary edge-confirmation (does s13-d1's economically-positive mechanic transfer to basket scope?). If the primary frame is reachability, then P6 IS metrics need a separate edge-significance check (e.g., bootstrap test on basket-summed PnL).

missed_item_5_t2_rev2_cash_equity_opport.description: PLAN section 19 mentions T2 rev2 cash-equity 3-name basket RSI(3) as 'co-recommended alternative' but does not provide a direct comparison on K9/DR10/cost_drag arithmetic.
missed_item_5_t2_rev2_cash_equity_opport.impact: Operator has selected T1 rev2 (s14-d1 multi-instrument micros) over T2 rev2 (cash-equity basket) at the parallel selection-plan layer. The opportunity cost is the foregone cleaner DR10 v2 clearance that cash-equity sub-fractional sizing offers.
missed_item_5_t2_rev2_cash_equity_opport.recommendation: Either (a) provide a side-by-side K9/DR10 reachability comparison in s14-d1 SEAL turn for transparency, OR (b) author a parallel review memo of T2 rev2 to make the trade-off explicit. The next-direction memo at 2b43b0b section 3.3 (DO-C cash-equity sub-fractional sizing) shows cash-equity clears DR10 v2 with broad margin (0.025 turnover ratio vs s14-d1's 100-300); this margin difference is material.

DO_A_lower_frequency_rsi_5_rsi_7.data_layer: existing audit-clean MNQ.c.0 only - cleanest data path
DO_A_lower_frequency_rsi_5_rsi_7.dr10_v2_status: Clears cost_drag branch likely (lower turnover than RSI(2))
DO_A_lower_frequency_rsi_5_rsi_7.k9_status_under_v2: BORDERLINE-TO-FAILS at single-instrument (15-25/y at RSI-5; 8-12/y at RSI-7)
DO_A_lower_frequency_rsi_5_rsi_7.s14_d1_comparison: s14-d1 trades K9 difficulty for DR10 v2 borderline; DO-A trades DR10 v2 clearance for K9 borderline. Different failure-mode profiles.

DO_B_multi_instrument_futures_basket.data_layer: 3 of 4 instruments need fresh fetch + DR9 audit
DO_B_multi_instrument_futures_basket.s14_d1_comparison: s14-d1 IS this option as instantiated by parallel. This audit recomputes parallel's arithmetic and finds borderline-to-failing at central case.

DO_C_cash_equity_sub_fractional.dr10_v2_status: CLEARS with margin (~0.025 turnover ratio; <1% cost_drag)
DO_C_cash_equity_sub_fractional.s14_d1_comparison: DO-C has structurally cleaner DR10 v2 clearance via sub-fractional notional; lower K9-risk under v2; but introduces new data layer + regulatory regime considerations (PDT etc.). Trade-off: data infrastructure cost vs DR10 v2 cleanliness.

DO_D_rsi_2_same_mechanic_as_s14_under_v2.s14_d1_comparison: Subtly: SINGLE-instrument RSI(2) at DA4=C under v2 is structurally cleaner than s14-d1's multi-instrument expansion. Sharpe is weak (+0.1076) but framework clearance is clean. PLAN considered this implicit when choosing multi-instrument but did not show direct comparison.

DO_F_pause.opportunity_cost_versus_s14_d1: Loss of test of multi-instrument + v2 framework reachability; gain of methodological reassessment time

edge_discovery_components: Pre-registered S0 net PnL sign expectation: positive (carried from s13-d1)
Pre-registered S2 cost-stress survival expectation: positive (carried from s13-d1)
BUT: weak observed sharpe at s13-d1 (+0.1076) means edge significance is open question even on single-instrument
framework_reachability_test_components: Tests whether DR10 v2 AND-conjunction permits a candidate that would fail under v1 OR-disjunctive
Tests whether K9 reachability is achievable on multi-instrument basket at retail-scale (DA4=B)
Tests whether parallel-session's selection-plan rev2 framework correctly identifies clearable paths
this_audit_framing_proposal_for_s14_d1.secondary_purpose: STRATEGY_VALIDATION (does s13-d1's economically-positive RSI(2) mechanic transfer to multi-instrument basket?)
strategy_validation_components: Tests whether RSI(2) bi-directional generalizes from MNQ.c.0 to MES/MYM/M2K
Tests whether bi-directional mean-reversion edge holds across 4 correlated equity-index micros vs single-instrument
this_audit_framing_proposal_for_s14_d1.tertiary_purpose: EDGE_DISCOVERY (does the basket-aggregated signal produce statistically-significant net PnL beyond what s13-d1's single-instrument MNQ result already demonstrated?)

review_section_6_strategy_validation_vs_.why_this_framing_matters: If primary purpose is FRAMEWORK_REACHABILITY (this audit's claim), then observed metrics at P6 IS should be evaluated against framework gates first; edge-quality is secondary. If primary purpose is EDGE_DISCOVERY (parallel's implicit framing), then framework clearance is necessary but not sufficient. The two framings produce different downstream decision criteria - the framing must be explicit at SEAL.

alternatives_considered.path: T2 rev2 cash-equity basket (DO-C in next-direction memo)
alternatives_considered.reasoning: Cleanest DR10 v2 clearance via sub-fractional sizing; introduces new data layer; better long-term framework-reachability demonstration
alternatives_considered.why_not_top_pick: New data layer is significant lift; parallel has already invested in micro-futures path; operator-decision territory

alternatives_considered.reasoning: Loss of forward research progress without compensating methodological gain
alternatives_considered.why_not_top_pick: Parallel session has accumulated meaningful framework work (v2 SEAL + governance supplement); pausing leaves this progress un-utilized

review_section_8_final_recommendation.recommendation_text: PROCEED WITH S14-D1 PLAN CONDITIONAL ON DA3 + COST_DRAG GATE BEING TIGHTENED AT SEAL. The plan is directionally sound (correctly identifies multi-instrument scope + v2 framework as the strongest K9/DR10 joint-clearance path for futures); but the parallel PLAN's cost_drag estimate is borderline at central case and the DA4 mitigation lever is structurally ineffective. Recommend SEAL-turn revisions: (a) declare candidate primary purpose as FRAMEWORK_REACHABILITY_TEST with secondary strategy-validation; (b) recompute cost_drag with explicit per-instrument per-trade dollar arithmetic; (c) consider DA3=C (0.25% risk) as the structurally-effective DR10 v2 cost_drag mitigation lever rather than DA4=C; (d) re-disclose K9-OOS reachability margin at conservative independence band (30-50%) and include OOS K9 sub-threshold contingency disposition explicitly; (e) provide direct K9/DR10/cost_drag comparison with T2 rev2 cash-equity basket for opportunity-cost transparency. This recommendation does NOT authorize any phase advancement; the next-phase authorization (availability-gate, DRAFT, etc.) requires fresh operator-issued authorization.

why_moderate: Plan is workable with the recommended SEAL-turn revisions
Without revisions, plan has ~30-50% probability of P6.5 REJECT_FAST on DR10 v2
With revisions (DA3=C + framing + independence audit), the candidate becomes a credible framework-reachability test
why_not_strong: DR10 v2 cost_drag at DA4=B borderline-to-failing at central estimate (5.71%)
DA4 capital scaling does NOT meaningfully reduce cost_drag (PLAN identifies wrong lever)
K9-OOS reachability margin depends on optimistic 70% independence assumption
Mechanic family same as terminated s13-d1; framework change is the load-bearing differentiator
Cash-equity alternative (T2 rev2) has structurally cleaner DR10 v2 clearance
why_not_weak: Directional choice (multi-instrument equity-index micros under v2) IS legitimate
K9 reachability arithmetic is sound at moderate independence assumption
Universe precommitment + DR9 gating discipline is well-structured
Reuses existing audit-clean MNQ.c.0 data; minimizes data-layer fresh-fetch
T-FORBID-9 and T-FORBID-10 cleared with both differentiations (universe + DA4)
DR10 v2 governance supplement (fdf9d6e) provides framework legitimacy

seal_method: sha256 over json.dumps(obj, sort_keys=True, separators=(",",":"), ensure_ascii=False) EXCLUDING report_seal_sha256 + seal_method
